name: Shadeling Cluster
description: Three smears of wrongness drifting low across the ground. They move like smoke — formless, slow, but the grass withers beneath them and the air goes cold where they pass. Individually fragile. Together, a creeping threat that dissolves what it touches.

action_pool.name: Corrosive Touch
action_pool.description: The shadeling drifts across your skin and where it passes, the warmth dies

action_pool.name: Corrosive Touch
action_pool.description: The shadeling drifts across your skin and where it passes, the warmth dies

action_pool.name: Corrosive Touch
action_pool.description: The shadeling drifts across your skin and where it passes, the warmth dies

name: Mawling Ambush
description: Two humanoid shapes step from the shadows — wrong in every proportion. Limbs too long, joints bending backwards. They have no faces, just an opening that radiates a field of dissolution. They reach for things. They grab. They pull.

action_pool.name: Grasping Maw
action_pool.description: The opening where a face should be lunges forward — what it touches begins to dissolve

action_pool.name: Seizing Grab
action_pool.description: Wrong-jointed arms reach with terrifying speed, pulling you toward the maw

action_pool.name: Grasping Maw
action_pool.description: The opening where a face should be lunges forward — what it touches begins to dissolve

action_pool.name: Seizing Grab
action_pool.description: Wrong-jointed arms reach with terrifying speed, pulling you toward the maw

name: The Lost Scout
description: It wears the armor of an Accord guild scout. The armor is scarred but recognizable — the guild insignia still visible on the shoulder plate. The body inside moves with terrible precision: too smooth, too rhythmic, a head that tracks too far. Once, mid-combat, it speaks a name. Not its own. Someone it loved.

action_pool.name: Corrupted Blade
action_pool.description: The sword swings with technique you recognize — guild-trained, precise. But the follow-through bends in a way no living swordsman would

action_pool.name: Hollow Echo
action_pool.description: A fragment of speech slips out — a name, a plea — and the sound of it hits harder than the blade

action_pool.name: Relentless Advance
action_pool.description: It doesn't stop. It walks through your guard the way water flows around stone

name: Hollow Wisp
description: A flickering mote of corrupt light, drawn to the living. Its touch drains warmth and will.

action_pool.name: Draining Touch
action_pool.description: A tendril of pale light lashes out, sapping warmth from flesh

action_pool.name: Hollow Drain
action_pool.description: The wisp pulses and a wave of emptiness washes over its victim

name: Hollow Patrol
description: A hunting pack of Hollow creatures — one larger Rend flanked by two drifting shades. They move in eerie coordination, the Rend leading while the Drifts circle like pale wolves.

action_pool.name: Claw Swipe
action_pool.description: A limb that shouldn't bend that way rakes forward with jagged edges

action_pool.name: Hollow Shriek
action_pool.description: A sound that isn't a sound — pressure behind the eyes, a ringing that tastes of metal

action_pool.name: Draining Touch
action_pool.description: A wisp of dark light grazes your skin and warmth drains from the contact point

action_pool.name: Draining Touch
action_pool.description: A wisp of dark light grazes your skin and warmth drains from the contact point

name: Hollow Warden
description: Something old guards the inner ruins. Taller than a man, its form shifts between solid and translucent. Where it steps, the stone darkens. It doesn't attack immediately — it watches, as if deciding whether you're a threat or a curiosity.

action_pool.name: Void Lash
action_pool.description: A tendril of absolute darkness whips forward — where it passes, the air goes silent

action_pool.name: Reality Fracture
action_pool.description: The Warden strikes the ground and for a heartbeat the world splits — two versions of the room overlap, neither quite real

action_pool.name: Absorb
action_pool.description: The Warden's wounds close as dark energy flows from its victim into its form
